tweet.text:
#ad I will always bleed black and gold. That’s why I love #CollegeColorsDay , man. Everyone’s gotta gear up on August 30 ahead of kickoff. LET’S GOOO @boilerfootball!! Big 10, baby!! #BoilerUp
Gear up now: https://t.co/6T2ZlppPVO https://t.co/c2VJTJgBif
Hard fought win! Gotta keep stacking them.
RT @CityofNSB: We will host @MiamiDolphins running back @RMos_8ball when he delivers #HurricaneMilton relief supplies including non-perisha…
